rationale: Reconfirmed at 18b2624a. git show --name-only HEAD lists exactly the 6 expected files. git diff d327cdce..18b2624a on cmd/mindspec/panel.go and internal/panel/create.go is empty, so prod is byte-identical to round-1 and my prior AC3 end-to-end confirmation stands unchanged. go build ./... succeeds. go test ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/panel ./internal/config ./internal/complete all pass, including the new additive TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues, which I verified with -v: it runs both allow and block-stale-sha subtests and internally loops all five real gate enum values (spec_approve, plan_approve, bead, final_review, adhoc) plus "", asserting PanelGateDecision and ApproveThreshold() are unaffected by Gate. internal/panel has no internal/config import (config-free leaf intact, only referenced in comments). internal/instruct failed (known pre-existing z4ps cwd-mutation flake), reported per instructions, not a blocker.
findings: SHA 18b2624a: git show --name-only HEAD == .mindspec/domains/workflow/interfaces.md, cmd/mindspec/panel.go, cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go, internal/panel/create.go, internal/panel/create_test.go, internal/panel/panel_test.go
git diff d327cdce 18b2624a -- cmd/mindspec/panel.go internal/panel/create.go is empty -> prod code unchanged since round-1 APPROVE

TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues (-v -count=1): PASS, 2 subtests (allow, block-stale-sha), each looping all 5 real gate values + empty string, asserting decision Action/Message and ApproveThreshold identical across all
internal/panel production files import no internal/config (grep confirms only comment references) -- config-free-leaf invariant intact
go test ./internal/instruct -count=1 FAILED -- pre-existing known z4ps flake (shared-cwd mutation across epic-phase tests), unrelated to spec-113-bead3, reported not treated as blocking
